subject: Snorunt, a small triangular-cloaked creature with a wide grin, depicted inside a stylized illustrated panel that resembles a tarot card or art-nouveau print
description: The artwork depicts Snorunt rendered inside what appears to be a framed illustrated panel or tarot-card-like art print, with decorative orange and teal borders and a palm tree visible in the background of the inner image. Snorunt itself is a small triangular shape with a wide grinning mouth, positioned centrally within the painted panel. The outer framing of the inner card and the meta-art composition give this piece an unusual layered, art-within-art quality. Warm sandy and teal tones dominate the palette.
foreground: Snorunt as small triangular figure inside a painted card-like frame
background: Stylized art-nouveau panel with palm tree and decorative border elements
